data.title: In HelloNation, San Diego Engineering Expert Jeff Marcic Explains Why Emergency Responder Radio Coverage Is Crucial
data.description: Emergency responder radio coverage plays a crucial role in ensuring effective communication for first responders. An article published on HelloNation highlights the significance of this, indicating that it is essential for maintaining connectivity and avoiding potentially hazardous communication breakdowns during emergencies. Insights shared in the article underscore the importance of reliable radio coverage for firefighters, as it can directly impact their ability to coordinate responses and ensure the safety of individuals involved. Jeff, a prominent figure in the field, emphasizes the vital role that dependable radio systems play in facilitating efficient emergency operations. This emphasizes the critical need for robust communication infrastructure to support emergency services, underscoring the potential risks associated with inadequate radio coverage.

data.title: GeoWealth Extends Series C Round With $42.5 Million Strategic Investment From Goldman Sachs
data.description: Chicago-based GeoWealth, a proprietary technology and turnkey asset management platform (TAMP), revealed an expansion in its Series C financing. The company secured a $42.5 million minority investment from Goldman Sachs to aid its current growth trajectory, with the aim of supporting additional expansion and offering liquidity to existing shareholders. Following this latest influx of funds, GeoWealth's majority ownership remains with its family office owner, The Globe Resources Group, while key players such as Apollo, BlackRock, and J.P. Morgan A remain involved in the firm.

data.title: The Finance Couple™ Joins Osaic Through Innovative Financial Group, Bringing $204 Million in Client Assets
data.description: Osaic, Inc., a prominent wealth management company, has welcomed The Finance Couple from LPL Financial, resulting in a transfer of $204 million in client assets. The advisory firm, based in Greenville, South Carolina, established by the husband-and-wife team Tim Curran, JD, CFP, and Wynne Curran, has now become a part of Osaic under the oversight of Innovative Financial Group (“IFG”). This move signifies a significant addition to Osaic's portfolio and expands its reach in the industry.

data.title: Spiritus Appoints Former Tesla Engineering Leader Dorian West and Brightmark Project Lead Kip Hensley to Support Commercial Scale-Up
data.description: In Santa Fe, New Mexico, a climate technology company called Spiritus revealed the addition of two key leaders to their team. This company focuses on developing carbon-negative power generation and large-scale direct air capture systems. Kip Hensley has been appointed as the Head of Project Development, while Dorian West has joined the company's Board of Directors. These appointments aim to enhance the company's capabilities in providing solid, carbon-negative power infrastructure tailored for AI data centers and other power-heavy clients. By expanding their team, Spiritus is positioning itself to meet the growing demand for AI-related services.

data.title: Fiber Deployment Project to Inject $100M into Flagstaff Economy via Public-Private Partnership
data.description: The Fiber Broadband Association unveiled a recent economic impact analysis showcasing the partnership between the City of Flagstaff, Arizona, and Wecom Fiber. This collaboration is making significant strides in fostering economic development, enhancing rural connectivity, and updating crucial infrastructure in northern Arizona. The study, titled "Broadband Community Profile: A Public-Private Partnership for Fiber – Flagstaff, Arizona," highlights how this joint effort is projected to bring in a minimum of $10 million to the region.

data.title: ELITE ISLAND RESORTS LAUNCHES "A LOVE LETTER TO ANTIGUA" CAMPAIGN CELEBRATING THE ISLAND'S BEAUTY AND CULTURE
data.description: Explore Antigua in a whole new way this summer with exciting Co-Created Getaways, an innovative interactive map, and thrilling summer adventures. Elite Island Resorts is offering this unique opportunity for travelers and travel professionals to experience the beauty of Antigua like never before. Featuring stunning photos taken by Elite Island Resorts, this experience promises an unforgettable journey. Get ready to immerse yourself in the magic of Antigua with exclusive packages and activities designed to create lasting memories. Don't miss out on this incredible opportunity to discover the wonders of Antigua with Elite Island Resorts this summer.

data.title: Berger Montague PC Investigating Potential Claims on Behalf of goeasy Ltd. Investors (OTC: EHMEF)
data.description: Philadelphia-based law firm Berger Montague PC has disclosed its investigation into possible legal actions against goeasy Ltd. (OTC: EHMEF) for investors who bought the company's shares in a recent period. The investigation is focused on determining any potential claims relating to the purchases or acquisitions of goeasy shares.

data.title: Bricklayer AI Introduces New Platform Capabilities for Coordinated, Enterprise-Scale Security Operations
data.description: Bricklayer AI, based in Arlington, Virginia, announced on March 19, 2026, the introduction of advanced features for their platform. These include Multi-Agent Context Engineering (MACE), collaborative investigative workspaces, and enterprise governance, tailored for the modern Security Operations Center (SOC). The newly revealed capabilities focus on deploying and managing coordinated AI agents efficiently. This update aligns with the company's mission to enhance security measures and streamline operations in SOC environments, catering to the evolving needs of enterprises.

data.title: Marshall Health Network partners with Notable to launch online scheduling and registration platform
data.description: In San Mateo, California on March 19, 2026, Marshall Health Network (MHN), an academic health system in West Virginia, collaborated with Notable, a prominent healthcare AI platform, to enhance access and streamline the primary care process for patients. This partnership aims to leverage AI technology to improve healthcare services. The use of AI solutions is set to significantly benefit patients by providing easier access and simplifying their primary care experiences. This collaboration is likely to revolutionize the healthcare industry by offering technologically advanced solutions to a wide range of patients.
